title: Outlier systems
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Sector |image=[[File:CorellianSector-SoF.png]] |name=Outlier systems |region=*[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' **[[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]]''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' |coordinates=M-11 |subsectors= |quadrants= |systems=*[[Aurea system/Legends|Aurea system]]''[[Suns of Fortune]]'' *[[Froz system/Legends|Froz system]] *[[Goorla system/Legends|Goorla system]] *[[Govia system/Legends|Govia system]] *[[Jumus system/Legends|Jumus system]] *[[New Plympto system/Legends|New Plympto system]]{{GamerCite|9|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Nosaurians}} *[[Nubus system]] *[[Sacorrian system]] *[[Talfaglio system/Legends|Talfaglio system]] *[[Xyquine system/Legends|Xyquine system]] |otherplanets= |moons= |stations= |asteroids= |comets= |nebulae= |routes=*[[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] *[[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] |other= |species=*[[Drall/Legends|Drall]]''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' *[[Frozian/Legends|Frozian]] *[[Govian]] *[[Human/Legends|Human]] *[[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]] *[[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] |capital= |affiliation= |battles1= |b1= |battles2= |b2= |battles3= |b3= |battles4= |b4= |battles5= |b5= |battles6= |b6= |battles7= |b7= |battles8= |b8= |battles9= |b9= }} {{Quote|What are outliers?''"
"''That's just the name for the star systems in the Corellian Sector that are sort of small and far away from Corell itself.|[[Anakin Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|}} The '''Outlier systems''', also known as the '''Outlier Worlds''', or simply as the '''Outliers''', was the term given to the dozens''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' of [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] within the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] that were considered unimportant and far away from the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. ==History== {{Quote|The Outlier systems are so secretive they make Corellia look wide open. Lots of people from the sector's Imperial government ran off to them and just dropped out of sight.|Leia Organa Solo|}} During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] redrew the boundaries of the [[Duro sector/Legends|Duro sector]], thus making [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] part of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]]. However, despite its position at the edge of the Corellian [[Sector/Legends|sector]], the [[Duro system/Legends|Duro system]] was not considered an Outlier [[Star system/Legends|system]]. {{System-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|news/13314_1.html|Corellia Closes Borders}} {{Mo}} *''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' *''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] {{Imo}} *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *{{FactFile|7|PLA 1-6|Planets of the Core Worlds}} *{{GamerCite|9|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Nosaurians}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{DB|location|corellia|Corellia}} *''[[Suns of Fortune]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Sistemas aislados }} [[Category:Corellian sector locations]] [[Category:Star system groups]]
